title: BUbreakingHeadlines
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson returns home to South Carolina to lie in state
At least 4 U.S. troops dead as Iran lashes out at America's Gulf allies
items.description: Day 3 of the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran sees America's military death toll rise to four, and skies full of missiles as Persian Gulf allies take hits.

items.title: WATCH:  Urgent rescue after hot air balloon crash
items.description: ABC News' Hannah Battah reports on a sky-high rescue in Northeast Texas after a hot air balloon got caught in a communications tower.

items.title: Department of Homeland Security warns of potential attacks amid Iran operation
items.description: The Department of Homeland Security has warned of potential lone-wolf and cyberattacks amid the ongoing strikes in Iran, according to a law enforcemen...

items.title: Photos showing last moments of men executed by Nazis appear on eBay
items.description: The photos showed "the last moments" of 200 men executed at an Athens shooting range on May 1, 1944, Greece's the culture ministry said.

items.title: Iran live updates: US says 3 F-15s shot down by friendly fire
items.description: The U.S. and Israel launched a joint attack on Iran on Saturday, officials said.

items.title: WATCH:  6-year-old son helps father coach hoops team
items.description: ABC News' Danny New talks to a 6-year-old boy who's becoming famous on social media by assisting his father in coaching a high school basketball team.

items.title: LIVE:  ABC News Live
items.description: 24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events

items.title: Trump says Iran operation could take "four weeks or less," 3 U.S. troops killed
items.description: The U.S. military says three troops have been killed in the war with Iran, as President Trump says the operation is proceeding "ahead of schedule." Fo...

items.title: FBI investigates Texas bar shooting that killed 2 and wounded 14 as possible terrorist act
3 US troops killed and 5 are seriously wounded during Iran attacks, military says
items.description: Three U.S. service members have been killed and five others seriously wounded during the attacks on Iran.
